Title: Relates to the computation of building aid for the Arlington central school district
Summary: Relates to the computation of building aid for the Arlington central school district; authorizes multi-year cost allowances to be established and used three times in a five-year period for construction, reconstruction or modernizing of one project by the Arlington central school district.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to the computation of building aid for the Arlington central school district
